message:
Command `# Check nc_socgen for a verify runner
find /nc/apps/nc_socgen -name "*.py" | xargs grep -l "verify\|runner\|scenario" 2>/dev/null | grep -v pycache | head -10
echo "---"
# Look at NC_SOCGEN scripts
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/scripts/ 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Check nc_socgen for a verify runner
find /nc/apps/nc_socgen -name "*.py" | xargs grep -l "verify\|runner\|scenario" 2>/dev/null | grep -v pycache | head -10
echo "---"
# Look at NC_SOCGEN scripts
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/scripts/ 2>/dev/null"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# Check nc_socgen for a verify runner
find /nc/apps/nc_socgen -name "*.py" | xargs grep -l "verify\|runner\|scenario" 2>/dev/null | grep -v pycache | head -10
echo "---"
# Look at NC_SOCGEN scripts
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/scripts/ 2>/dev/null
